name: kb-extension
description: Personal knowledge base with Copilot Chat integration

chatParticipants.name: kb
chatParticipants.description: Knowledge Base assistant for managing and searching your personal knowledge base

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search the knowledge base for relevant documents and information

commands.name: list
commands.description: List all documents in the knowledge base

commands.name: ingest
commands.description: Add new documents or content to the knowledge base

commands.name: cleanup
commands.description: Remove non-critical documents while retaining critical items

kbExtension.storage.databasePath.description: Path to SQLite database file for KB storage

kbExtension.storage.autoBackup.description: Automatically backup database on extension load

kbExtension.storage.backupRetention.description: Number of days to retain database backups

kbExtension.embedding.provider.description: Embedding provider. 'none' disables semantic embeddings for a smaller fully offline build, 'transformers' uses local JS runtime, 'ollama' uses a local Ollama server, 'lm-studio' uses LM Studio

kbExtension.embedding.model.description: Model name for embeddings. For 'transformers': all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (384D), sentence-transformers/all-mpnet-base-v2 (768D). For 'ollama'/'lm-studio': model name in your deployment

kbExtension.embedding.dimension.description: Vector embedding dimension (384 for MiniLM, 768 for larger models)

kbExtension.embedding.cacheEmbeddings.description: Cache computed embeddings to avoid re-embedding same chunks

kbExtension.search.semanticProvider.description: Where to store and search vectors. 'qdrant' = local Qdrant Docker, 'local' = SQLite vectors table

kbExtension.search.fullTextEnabled.description: Enable full-text search in addition to semantic search

kbExtension.search.hybridSearchWeight.description: Weight for blending semantic (vector) and full-text search (0=FT only, 1=semantic only)

kbExtension.search.topK.description: Default number of search results to return

kbExtension.search.copilotReranking.description: Use Copilot Chat to rerank lexical search results when embeddings are unavailable

kbExtension.ui.sidebarPosition.description: Position of KB sidebar in VS Code

kbExtension.ui.autoRefresh.description: Auto-refresh document list when files change

kbExtension.advanced.enableDiagnostics.description: Enable detailed diagnostics logging (may impact performance)

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
